description: SkyWatch provides aviation insurance products under the SkyWatch.ai brand and, separately, SkyWatch geospatial APIs for searching and ordering satellite imagery and related data. Its public docs describe imagery search, pricing, orders, governance, and MCP access for AI assistants.
summary: SkyWatch exposes a REST API at `https://api.skywatch.co/earthcache` authenticated by an `x-api-key` API key, plus public MCP servers at `https://api.skywatch.co/mcp` and the catalog-listed `https://renters-mcp.skywatch.ai/mcp`.
